novel_features.name: Warm-intro path
novel_features.description: Given a target person, find mutual connections across your LinkedIn 1st-degree AND your Happenstance network who can introduce you.
novel_features.rationale: No existing tool joins LinkedIn's 1st-degree graph with Happenstance's network graph - requires a unified local store.

novel_features.name: Company network coverage
novel_features.description: For any company, see who you already know there via LinkedIn 1st-degree or Happenstance friends, ranked by relationship strength.
novel_features.rationale: Requires the intersection of LinkedIn company-employee data with your Happenstance friend affiliations - impossible with either source alone.

novel_features.name: Cross-source prospect search
novel_features.description: Fan-out search across LinkedIn, Happenstance, and Deepline (budget-gated). Dedupes by LinkedIn URL, ranks by network strength plus relevance.
novel_features.rationale: No other tool searches all three sources in one pass with budget awareness.

novel_features.name: Unified dossier
novel_features.description: Compose a single view of a person from LinkedIn profile, Happenstance research, and optionally Deepline enrichment.
novel_features.rationale: Locally cached by LinkedIn URL so repeat lookups are free. No other tool produces a single-sheet dossier from all three.

novel_features.name: Prospect budget
novel_features.description: Aggregate Deepline spend this month, recent high-cost calls, enforce limits.
novel_features.rationale: Deepline costs real money per call - a local SQLite ledger is the only way to bound spend pre-flight.

novel_features.name: Network intersection
novel_features.description: People who appear in BOTH your LinkedIn 1st-degree and your Happenstance network - your highest-signal warm intros.
novel_features.rationale: Intersection of two graphs requires both in one store.

novel_features.name: Since-last-sync diff
novel_features.description: Time-windowed diff across LinkedIn connections, Happenstance feed, and new research.
novel_features.rationale: Requires local snapshots across sources - no API gives you a cross-source changelog.

novel_features.name: Network graph export
novel_features.description: Export your full cross-source network as GEXF, DOT, or JSON for Gephi or Graphviz.
novel_features.rationale: Only possible with a unified entity table across sources.
